item.title: @elonmusk: The EU deep state is telling us (via state-owned media and Soros-funded NGOs) that Telegram is a PRO...
item.description: The EU deep state is telling us (via state-owned media and Soros-funded NGOs) that Telegram is a PROBLEM because people can discuss content from OTHER social media in PRIVATE telegram groups. This nonsense is used to justify surveillance (Chat Control) and censorship (DSA).

item.title: @elonmusk: What X is doing with translation is one of the most amazing things that has ever happened on the int...
item.description: What X is doing with translation is one of the most amazing things that has ever happened on the internet. Bravo@elonmuskand@nikitabier. What a civilization level breakthrough.

item.title: @elonmusk: Setting aside whether her childhood accident was an unconscious act for the moment, her astonishing ...
item.description: Setting aside whether her childhood accident was an unconscious act for the moment, her astonishing theory that most of the rapists, murderers, and child molesters in prison acted “accidentally” is mind-boggling. More importantly it is a powerful lesson about the liberal mind. We can now be assured that this opportunistic little piece of work, like so many of her ilk, will invariably weep for the criminal, but consider his victims, if she indeed considers them at all, as collateral damage. One thing is clear: she’s an even more dreadful monster than her vile, dangerous, deranged husband.

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla V14.3 self-driving review. The point releases will bring polish. V15 will far exceed human lev...
item.description: Tesla V14.3 self-driving review. The point releases will bring polish. V15 will far exceed human levels of safety, even in completely unsupervised and complex situations.

item.title: @elonmusk: Working at 𝕏 is ‘intense’ the same way a rollercoaster is intense. If you love rollercoasters, it’s ...
item.description: Working at 𝕏 is ‘intense’ the same way a rollercoaster is intense. If you love rollercoasters, it’s just fun.

item.title: @elonmusk: Just crushed FSD 14.3 through Mountain View & Sunnyvale straight to Starbucks with@that1evguyjay! 🚗☕...
item.description: Just crushed FSD 14.3 through Mountain View & Sunnyvale straight to Starbucks with@that1evguyjay! 🚗☕@Grokpicked the ENTIRE route end-to-end and the confidence was unreal. Zero interventions the whole drive — buttery smooth accel/decel, lightning reactions, and it nailed every tricky urban move: no-right-turn-on-red without hesitation, zero drifting into oncoming traffic, and crushed all those complex city paths like a pro. It confidently rerouted us to Shoreline Park and smoothly handled a blocked path… but wouldn’t park itself at the end so I had to take manual control. Still, this version feels next-level human. 14.3 is straight fire 🔥 Video shot on@insta360Ace Pro 2shorturl.at/pYtGV@elonmusk@tesla@aelluswamy@Tesla_AI

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceXAI Colossus 2 now has 7 models in training: - Imagine V2 - 2 variants of 1T - 2 variants of 1....
item.description: SpaceXAI Colossus 2 now has 7 models in training: - Imagine V2 - 2 variants of 1T - 2 variants of 1.5T - 6T - 10T Some catching up to do.
